title: Usuário que prefere teclado — navegar entre resultados

RF-022.description: ↑ e ↓ movem o foco entre itens
RF-022.evidence: Library guarantee: cmdk Command root onKeyDown handles ArrowDown → Q(1) and ArrowUp → Q(-1), iterating over '[cmdk-item]:not([aria-disabled])' elements and calling setState('value'). Verified in cmdk/dist/index.mjs source.
RF-022.implementationProof: cmdk Command root: case 'ArrowDown': ue(e) → Q(1); case 'ArrowUp': de(e) → Q(-1)

RF-023.description: Enter seleciona o item em foco e executa ação
RF-023.evidence: Library guarantee: cmdk Command root onKeyDown case 'Enter' dispatches 'cmdk-item-select' event on selected item; Command.Item listens and calls onSelect callback. NavigationGroup.tsx uses onSelect to call router.push(href) + parent onSelect(). Test 'navega ao clicar num item e chama onSelect' covers click path (same onSelect handler).
RF-023.implementationProof: cmdk: case 'Enter': a.dispatchEvent(new Event('cmdk-item-select')); Item.onSelect → router.push(href); onSelect()

RF-024.description: Esc fecha o palette sem executar ação
RF-024.evidence: Explicit test in command-palette.test.tsx line 25-32: 'chama onOpenChange(false) ao pressionar Esc'. userEvent.keyboard('{Escape}') → onOpenChange called with false. Radix Dialog Root handles Esc natively, triggers onOpenChange(false). Test PASSES.

RF-025.description: Foco capturado dentro do modal (focus trap)
RF-025.evidence: Library guarantee: Radix Dialog Content provides built-in focus trap via @radix-ui/react-dialog. component-palette.tsx uses Radix Dialog Root + Portal + Content. No custom focus trap code needed.
RF-025.implementationProof: command-palette.tsx: import { Content, Overlay, Portal, Root } from '@radix-ui/react-dialog'

RF-026.evidence: Library guarantee verified in cmdk source: Command.Input renders with role='combobox', aria-expanded=true, aria-controls=listId, aria-labelledby=labelId, aria-activedescendant=selectedItemId. Command.List renders with role='listbox', aria-activedescendant=selectedItemId. Command.Item renders with role='option', aria-selected, aria-disabled.

libraryGuarantees: cmdk@latest: ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation (RF-022), Enter selection (RF-023), ARIA combobox + activedescendant (RF-026)
customTestCoverage: RF-024 — explicit Vitest test 'chama onOpenChange(false) ao pressionar Esc' (PASSES)
